notes:
I used a Proton setting meant for another game, that's why I chose "out of the box". I didn't have to change anything in order to make it work.

The setting I used that was meant for another game is this:

 #   "PROTON_USE_WINED3D": "1",
 #   "PROTON_NO_D3D11": "1",
 "PROTON_NO_ESYNC": "1",
 
and the game ran perfectly!
title: RDS - The Official Drift Videogame

notes: Installed it, Started it and i played it. Experienced no problems with anything, if you have a controller and have xpadneo installed it also fully works without any problems.
title: RDS - The Official Drift Videogame
